what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-11 in the design-source channel, declaring it as the source design ground-truth for presentation-15p/p-11.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata record for an image asset
declares mime image/jpeg but width and height are 0
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body contains only the line 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-11.jpg'
standouts: Explicitly labeled as design ground-truth source material
Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image file
Contains a blob hash but no descriptive or relationship metadata
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and provenance fields
Uses an image:// channel address scheme and a blob:// storage reference
Separates structured metadata from a short free-text source note
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record
No links or relationships to other ledger entries
No alt text, caption, or visual description
notes: A minimal metadata stub for a design-source image slide asset, claiming ground-truth status but missing dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does p-11 contain?
How is this image used within the presentation-15p set?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image; the actual content is a sparse metadata stub with zero dimensions and no descriptive content, so it partially matches but lacks expected image details.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog and anchor a source image asset in a presentation set by giving it a stable identity, channel address, blob reference, and creation provenance.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, channel address, blob hash, and creation provenance for a design-source image asset, which a fused system could retain as an asset ledger record.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for the image asset p-11 in the design-source channel, identified as the source design ground-truth for presentation-15p/p-11.jpg.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and anchor a source image slide used as ground truth in a 15-page presentation.
